17.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

17.gl: to hide (by covering over); by implication, to hoard or reserve; figuratively to deny; specifically (favorably) to protect, (unfavorably) to lurk
17.kj: esteem, hide(-den one, self), lay up, lurk (be set) privily, (keep) secret(-ly, place).
fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.

18.gl: properly, to bore, i.e. (by implication) to wound, to dissolve; figuratively, to profane (a person, place or thing), to break (one's word), to begin (as if by an 'opening wedge'); to play (the flute)
18.kj: begin ([idiom] men began), defile, [idiom] break, defile, [idiom] eat (as common things), [idiom] first, [idiom] gather the grape thereof, [idiom] take inheritance, pipe, player on
18.dv: a primitive root (compare H2470 (חָלָה)); also  denominative (from H2485 (חָלִיל))

18.gl: to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications)

18.gl: properly, a repetition, i.e. a duplicate (copy of a document), or a double (in amount); by implication, a second (in order, rank, age, quality or location)
18.kj: college, copy, double, fatlings, next, second (order), twice as much.

18.gl: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion
18.kj: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

18.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
18.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).

20.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

21.kj: hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

21.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
21.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
